chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4112 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No. 2.For hearing of CMA No. 3.For hearing of main case. 14.04.2025 Mr.Salahuddin Ghandapur, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. The petitioner has impugned a notice of appearance dated 03.08.2023 issued by Mukhtiarkar Taluka Ibrahim Hydery, District Malir, Karachi, which reads as follows: “ OFFICE OF THE MUKHTIARKAR TALUKA IBRAHIM HYDERY, DISTRICT MALIR KARACHI Office Adress: AC Ibrahim Hyderi office Main Dawood Chowrangi Landhi, Karachi No.MUKH/I.H/Malir/907/2023 Karachi Dated: 03/08/2023 1. Seth Ali Akber Bhanbham 6. Seth Fakhar Uddin 2. Iqbal Phull 7. Ramzan Dogar 3. Haji Shoukat 8. Punjabi Brothers 4. Ch Ghulam Nabi 11 Afzal 5. Aslam Khan 12 Shakeel 6. Seth Fakhar Uddin 13 Haji Sultan 7. Ashraf 14 Misri 8. Roshan 15 Wahid Rind 9. Sharafat 16 Ehsan 10. Khizar 17 Asad 11. Zubair Nagori 18 Naveed Dogar 12. Zaman 19 Shoukat Mukhtar SUBJECT: NOTICE FOR APPEARANCE. Whereas, the undersigned come to know through village staff of this office as well as personal visit and found that your cattle Farms are available at road facing which cause the spread of harmful diseases to the general public and blockage of drainage Nallah near main road of Mehran highway. In view of the above circumstances you are directed to shift your cattle farms to another place to avoid any inconvenience for the general public.

Whereas, the undersigned come to know through village staff of this office as well as personal visit and found that your cattle Farms are available at road facing which cause the spread of harmful diseases to the general public and blockage of drainage Nallah near main road of Mehran highway. In view of the above circumstances you are directed to shift your cattle farms to another place to avoid any inconvenience for the general public. On immediate basis because the development work of Mehran Highway is under process. You further directed to record your submission within 02 days positively in the office of the undersigned. Sd/- MUKHTIARKAR TALUKA IBRAHIM HYDERI DISTRICT MALIR KARACHI” The notice provides an opportunity and a forum for the petitioner to be heard, while the petitioner remained at liberty to agitate any grievance before the relevant forum, no case is made out for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise, the cause agitated appears to involve disputed questions of facts etc., which are not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
